skill.core.navigation.description.advanc:
{Advanced Navigation}
Increases your hero's movement points at sea by 100% and allows free ship boarding
skill.core.navigation.description.basic:
{Basic Navigation}
Increases your hero's movement points at sea by 50% and allows free ship boarding
skill.core.navigation.description.expert:
{Expert Navigation}
Increases your hero's movement points at sea by 150% and allows free ship boarding
